description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named Check ASan & UBSan that runs on push events to all branches except master, staging.tmp, trying.tmp, and staging-squash-merge.tmp, and on pull requests. Use an ubuntu-latest job that checks out the repository with submodules, prepares the Linux environment, builds the project with AddressSanitizer and UndefinedBehaviorSanitizer enabled, runs the server and headless client with sanitizers, and executes integration tests with sanitizers.
